system.descriptor: Stealth is the art of moving unseen and unheard, concealing oneself, and avoiding detection.
system.uses:
Uses: Sneaking past guards, hiding, shadowing a target, concealing objects.
Stealth is typically opposed by Awareness. Movement rate affects difficulty: moving at Half rate imposes no penalty, Full rate imposes -10, running imposes -30. Size, lighting, and cover modify the test. A character in heavy armour suffers -30 to Stealth unless the armour has special qualities.

description.value: Stealth is the art of moving unseen and unheard, concealing oneself, and avoiding detection.
